zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman於1812年11月25日出生在美國俄亥俄州。她於1834年3月18日與Joshua Parker Sullivan在美國俄亥俄州哈帕易恩結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1847年11月27日在美國伊利諾州肯德爾享年35歲，埋葬在美國伊利諾州肯德爾納-奧-賽 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Wisman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of North German Wis(s)mann, a variant of Wischmann.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Panic! of 1819
historicEvents.description: With the Aftermath of the Napoleonic Wars the global market for trade was down. During this time, America had its first financial crisis and it lasted for only two years.

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: Black Hawk War
historicEvents.description: "The Black Hawk War was a brief conflict between the United States and Native Americans led by Black Hawk, a Sauk leader. The war erupted soon after Black Hawk and a group of other tribes, known as the ""British Band"", crossed the Mississippi River, into Illinois, from Iowa Indian Territory in April 1832. Black Hawk's motives were ambiguous, but records show that he was hoping to avoid bloodshed while resettling on tribal land that had been given to the United States in the 1804 Treaty of St. Louis."

historicEvents.title: Kirtland Temple Dedicated
historicEvents.description: On March 27, 1836, the Kirtland Temple was dedicated.
Historical Boundaries: 1841: Kendall, Illinois, United States
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman was born on 25 November 1812, in Ohio, United States. She married Joshua Parker Sullivan on 18 March 1834, in Champaign, Ohio, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 27 November 1847, in Kendall, Illinois, United States, at the age of 35, and was buried in Na-Au-Say Township, Kendall, Illinois, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman est née le 25 novembre 1812, à Ohio, États-Unis. Elle a épousé Joshua Parker Sullivan le 18 mars 1834, à Champaign, Ohio, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1847, à Kendall, Illinois, États-Unis, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à Na-Au-Say Township, Kendall, Illinois, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman wurde am 25. November 1812 in Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten geboren. Sie hat am 18. März 1834 in Champaign, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten Joshua Parker Sullivan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. November 1847 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Kendall, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Na-Au-Say Township, Kendall, Illinois, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wismanは1812年11月25日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州で生まれた。1834年3月18日にアメリカ合衆国オハイオ州チャンペイグンでJoshua Parker Sullivanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1847年11月27日にアメリカ合衆国イリノイ州ケンダルで35歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国イリノイ州ケンダルナ-アウ-サイ トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman(은)는 1812년 11월 25일 미국 오하이오 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1834년 3월 18일 미국 오하이오 주 챔파익에서 Joshua Parker Sullivan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1847년 11월 27일 미국 일리노이 주 켄달에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 일리노이 주 켄달 나-오-지 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1812, em Ohio, Estados Unidos da América. Ela casou-se com Joshua Parker Sullivan em 18 de março de 1834, em Champaign, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1847, em Kendall, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em Na-Au-Say Township, Kendall, Ilinóis, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Ann Wisman родилась 25 ноября 1812 г. в местности Огайо, Соединенные штаты. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Joshua Parker Sullivan 18 марта 1834 г. в местности чампеигн, Огайо, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 27 ноября 1847 г. в местности кендалл, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности на-ау-сеи тоуншип, кендалл, Иллинойс, Соединенные штаты.
